ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., shirt, dress, pants) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size designation of the clothing item (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL, 3XL, 4XL) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the clothing item */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the clothing item */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the clothing item */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve measurement of the clothing item */,
  "cuff" REAL /* Cuff measurement of the clothing item */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "product_line" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the clothing item belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the item */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_product_line FOREIGN KEY ("product_line") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product line was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the product line */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., bust, waist, shoulder, sleeve, cuff, length) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the measurement to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the measurement */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
